name: Supernova Design System Platform API
what_it_does: Design system management and documentation platform with REST API — enabling design teams to sync Figma components and design tokens, auto-generate code (React, iOS, Android, Flutter) from design tokens, create living documentation, and manage multi-brand design systems with version control and CI/CD integration.
use_cases: Syncing Figma design tokens to Supernova and auto-generating platform-specific code (React, iOS Swift, Android Kotlin, Flutter)
Managing design system documentation pages and component status via Supernova API
Integrating Supernova token pipeline into CI/CD for automated token publishing on design updates
Querying design system component inventory and documentation coverage metrics
Publishing multi-brand design token exports across platforms via Supernova API
not_for: Design file creation (use Figma for design work — Supernova consumes Figma output)
Component development and testing (use Storybook directly for component development)
General project management (use Jira or Linear for sprint and issue tracking)
best_when: A design system team with Figma as source of truth needs automated multi-platform code generation from design tokens — eliminating manual token translation to React, iOS, Android, and Flutter.
avoid_when: You don't use Figma, have no formal design token system, are a small team where Notion docs suffice, or need component testing rather than documentation.

auth.notes: API key from Supernova workspace settings. Bearer token auth. Workspace-scoped access. Webhook for design system update events (token changes, component updates, documentation publishes). Figma integration via Figma OAuth for design sync. SDK (supernova-sdk) for JavaScript/TypeScript custom exporters. Token export pipeline via Supernova CLI. No OAuth2 for API auth.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 1 design system, limited features, community support
pricing.paid_tiers: Team $199/month (up to 10 users); Business $499/month; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Czech company (Prague). Founded 2016. Raised $16M Series A (2022). Backed by Bessemer Venture Partners (BVP), Gradient Ventures (Google). Figma-first design system management with code generation differentiator. Multi-platform token export: React, iOS Swift, Android Kotlin, Flutter, CSS, SCSS. Custom exporters via SDK. Used by Spotify, Kiwi.com, Productboard. EU company with GDPR-first design.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per workspace; not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for design systems, tokens, components, and documentation. API key bearer auth. Good documentation with JavaScript/TypeScript SDK examples. Figma OAuth required for design sync. Custom exporter SDK for advanced code generation. Webhook for design update events. CLI for token pipeline automation. Rate limits not documented publicly.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Design system reads fully idempotent. Token reads idempotent. Documentation page reads idempotent. Token sync operations are triggered updates — use sync job ID for status tracking.
known_agent_gotchas: Figma OAuth required for design component sync — separate from Supernova API key
Custom exporter SDK is JavaScript/TypeScript — requires coding to create custom platform exports
Free tier limited to 1 design system — insufficient for multi-brand systems
Token sync is asynchronous — Figma changes take time to propagate to Supernova
Multi-platform code generation requires configuring exporters per target platform

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and SOC2 compliant. EU and US data residency. API key auth. Czech company with GDPR-first design. Design tokens may contain unreleased brand identities — restrict access. Custom exporter SDK imports design data — audit exporter code in CI/CD pipeline. Figma OAuth scopes should be minimal (read-only for component sync).
